name: Valora Cri Indice De Preco Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario
summary: Valora Cri Indice De Preco Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario is a Brazilian real estate investment fund that invests primarily in Real Estate Receivables Certificates (CRIs) linked to price indices. The fund aims to provide investors with income and capital appreciation through its diversified portfolio of CRIs. It is traded on the Brazilian stock exchange.
